summary: Structured forms with care-sector standards fully tested. All backend endpoints return correct form templates with sections, auto-fill data, and conditional field configurations. Frontend properly renders sectioned layouts, auto-fill indicators, profile update notices, and conditional fields.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/form-submissions/template/health_screening returns form with 6 sections (Section A-F)
✅ Backend: Health Screening sections: Personal Details, Job Exposure, Health History, Functional Ability, Employee Declaration, Employer Use Only
✅ Backend: Health Screening has auto_fill_fields defined (full_name, date_of_birth, job_title, address, phone, email)
✅ Backend: Health Screening has conditional fields in Health History section (e.g., epilepsy_fainting_details conditional on has_epilepsy_fainting=Yes)
✅ Backend: GET /api/form-submissions/template/staff_personal_info returns form with updates_profile: true
✅ Backend: Staff Personal Info has 7 sections (basic_details, contact_details, national_insurance, emergency_contact, bank_details, driving_vehicle, declaration)
✅ Backend: GET /api/form-submissions/template/equal_opportunities returns form with is_optional: true
✅ Backend: Equal Opportunities has description mentioning 'voluntary' completion
✅ Backend: GET /api/form-submissions/template/hmrc_starter_checklist returns form with is_conditional: true
✅ Backend: HMRC has conditional student loan plan field (conditional_on: has_student_loan, conditional_value: Yes)
✅ Backend: HMRC has auto_fill_fields (full_name, address, postcode, country, ni_number, date_of_birth)
✅ Backend: GET /api/form-submissions/auto-fill/{requirement_id}/{employee_id} returns pre-filled data from employee profile
✅ Backend: Auto-fill endpoint returns 404 for invalid form type
✅ Backend: Auto-fill endpoint returns 404 for invalid employee ID
✅ Backend: GET /api/form-submissions/templates returns all form templates (7+ templates)
✅ Backend: Recruitment Checklist has 5 sections (identity_legal, dbs_section, employment_history, qualifications, final_section)
✅ Backend: Compliance endpoint returns completion_percentage (91% for test employee)
✅ Frontend: Form modal shows sectioned layout with collapsible sections
✅ Frontend: Auto-filled fields show '(auto-filled)' indicator next to field labels
✅ Frontend: Auto-fill notice banner: 'Some fields have been pre-filled from the employee profile. Please review and update as needed.'
✅ Frontend: Profile update notice appears for staff_personal_info form: 'This form can update the employee's profile data when submitted.'
✅ Frontend: Conditional fields only show when condition is met (e.g., Driving Licence Number appears when 'Yes' selected for driving licence)
✅ Frontend: HMRC form shows conditional student loan plan field when 'Yes' selected for student loan
✅ Frontend: HMRC form shows description about P45 requirement
✅ Frontend: Equal Opportunities marked as 'Optional - Does not affect compliance' in requirements list
critical_code_review_comments: Backend FORM_BASED_REQUIREMENTS at lines 2052-2606 properly defines all form templates with sections, auto-fill fields, and conditional logic
Backend form template endpoint at lines 7811-7831 returns sections, is_optional, is_conditional, updates_profile flags correctly
Backend auto-fill endpoint at lines 7834-7971 properly maps employee profile fields to form fields
Frontend form modal at lines 5901-6191 correctly renders sectioned layouts with conditional field logic
Frontend auto-fill indicator at line 5990-5992 shows '(auto-filled)' for pre-filled fields
Frontend profile update notice at lines 5944-5952 shows amber warning for forms that update profile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Structured forms feature fully verified. All form templates (health_screening, staff_personal_info, equal_opportunities, hmrc_starter_checklist, recruitment_checklist, induction, interview_record) have sectioned layouts with auto-fill support. Key features: 1) Health Screening has 6 sections (A-F) covering personal details, job exposure, health history, functional ability, declaration, employer use. 2) Staff Personal Info has updates_profile=true flag. 3) Equal Opportunities has is_optional=true. 4) HMRC has is_conditional=true (required when no P45). 5) Auto-fill endpoint pre-fills form data from employee profile. 6) Frontend shows auto-fill indicators, profile update notices, and conditional fields work correctly.
